heading: Budget request
label: 5393 Budget request
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 458aaa–12 of this title

children.heading: Requirement of annual budget request
children.label: a Requirement of annual budget request

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The President shall identify in the annual budget request submitted to Congress under all funds necessary to fully fund all funding agreements authorized under this subchapter, including funds specifically identified to fund tribal base budgets. All funds so appropriated shall be apportioned to the Indian Health Service. Such funds shall be provided to the Office of Tribal Self-Governance which shall be responsible for distribution of all funds provided under .section 1105 of title 31section 5385 of this title

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: 2 Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this subsection shall be construed to authorize the Indian Health Service to reduce the amount of funds that a self-governance tribe is otherwise entitled to receive under its funding agreement or other applicable law, whether or not such funds are apportioned to the Office of Tribal Self-Governance under this section.

children.heading: Present funding; shortfalls
children.label: b Present funding; shortfalls
children.text: In such budget request, the President shall identify the level of need presently funded and any shortfall in funding (including direct program and contract support costs) for each Indian tribe, either directly by the Secretary of Health and Human Services, under self-determination contracts, or under compacts and funding agreements authorized under this subchapter.
